title: poa alpina subsp. atlantica
intro: Poa alpina subsp. atlantica, also known as the Atlantic alpine meadow-grass, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the genus Poa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Poa alpina subsp. atlantica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
